sentences.text: Hello and thank you for calling the Beach Company. Please listen carefully as our menu options have recently changed. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. To reach our dial by name directory, please press one. To reach our dial by department directory, please press two. If you have an after hours property management emergency, please dial nine. To be connected with the answering service. For general contact information, press five. Thank you again for calling the Beach Company. This key is not valid. Please try again. Hello and thank you for calling the beach company. Please listen carefully as our menu options have recently changed. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time To reach our dial by name directory, please press one. To reach our dial by department directory, please press two. If you have an after hours property management emergency, please dial nine to be connected with the answering service. For general contact information. Press five. Thank you again for calling the Beach Company. Your call cannot be transferred. Please try again later. Thank you.
